visualizerParams.title: Ordered Fractions
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Fix the logic to correctly find the fraction immediately to the left of 3/7.

solution.code:
def solution(limit: int = 1000000):
    best_n = 0
    # Use cross-multiplication to avoid floating point issues
    # n1/d1 > n2/d2  <=>  n1*d2 > n2*d1
    best_num, best_den = 0, 1
    for d in range(1, limit + 1):
        # Largest n such that n/d < 3/7 is floor((3d - 1) / 7)
        n = (3 * d - 1) // 7
        if n * best_den > best_num * d:
            best_num = n
            best_den = d
    return best_num


if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(solution(1000000))
